channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Home-delivered, medically tailored groceries improve diabetes control
item.description: A Kaiser Permanente and Food is Medicine Institute study found that home-delivered, medically tailored groceries help improve diabetes management.

item.title: Motherhood may reduce late-life frailty rather than raise it, companion dog model suggests
item.description: Frailty increases vulnerability to falls and hospitalizations in older adults, but a companion dog model suggests motherhood may lower this risk.

item.title: Health Data Platform Will Connect Hospitals Across Provinces
item.description: The VITAL system collects near real-time hospital data to optimize healthcare delivery, research, and innovation while safeguarding privacy.

item.title: CSF Biomarker Panel May Improve Diagnosis of CNS Lymphoma
item.description: A prospective multicenter study validates three cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers that may aid in diagnosing suspected primary CNS lymphoma.
